utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Health coverage includes physical and mental health with costs; property coverage describes home/contents insurance with costs; travel coverage includes global travel insurance with costs; additional_services includes Isabella’s plan and its costs; total_budget includes complete monthly and annual totals. Therefore, all 5 required items are present and fully specified.
